content:
# Session 31 (iter-031) — Summary

## Metadata
- Sorry count (project-wide, term-position): **2 → 2** net, but composition changed: μ_appIso_collapse
  CLOSED, residual moved to `lhs_tmul`. The two live sorries:
  `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:4362` (`pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul`) and
  `TensorObjInverse.lean:211` (`trivialisation_restrict_compat`).
- **Headline recovery:** the import chain rebuilt GREEN. `sync_leanok` iter=31 sha=89aa489:
  **+34/−0** (recovers the iter-029 −29 regression AND marks the new closures). gaps=0, doctor clean.
- Prover lanes: **1** (`TensorObjSubstrate`, status done). The L219 DualInverse name-shadow fix was
  applied via the plan-phase `refactor` route (per ARCHON_MEMORY), NOT a prover lane — which is why
  the whole chain compiles and DualInverse/TensorObjInverse carry no build break.

## Target: `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` — SOLVED (K1 μ/δ-side critical-path closure)
The iter-026..030 "circular mate route" blocker is finally bypassed. Approach: the K1 μ/δ-collapse
`δ Gβ A B = H1.hom(A⊗B) ; δ(pullback φ') A B ; (H1.inv A ⊗ₘ H1.inv B)` is a category-theoretic
identity with nothing scheme-specific, so it was extracted as a NEW abstract helper:

```
deltaConjOfMuComparison (adj₁ : F₁ ⊣ G) (adj₂ : F₂ ⊣ G) [F₁.OplaxMonoidal] [F₂.OplaxMonoidal]
  [G.LaxMonoidal] [adj₂.IsMonoidal] (A B)
  (hμ : μ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adj₁) (F₁ A) (F₁ B) = μ G (F₁ A) (F₁ B)) :
  δ F₁ A B = (adj₁.leftAdjointUniq adj₂).hom (A⊗B) ; δ F₂ A B ; (H1.inv A ⊗ₘ H1.inv B)
```
`pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` is then `exact deltaConjOfMuComparison hadj'
(pullbackPushforwardAdjunction φ') A B (pushforward_lax_mu_comparison f A B)`.

**Why the abstract extraction was the unlock:** inline on the K1 lemma the goal terms are the
zeta-reduced statement-`let`s (`Gβ`/`φ'`/`hadj'` fully unfolded), and `pushforward₀OfCommRingCat`
sections make `erw` whnf-explode (200000-heartbeat timeout) while plain `rw` won't key-match the
unfolded `≫`. Stating it abstractly (`Type*`, clean fvars) removes the let-fold/whnf friction.

**Helper proof recipe (verified, axiom-clean):**
- `apply (adj₁.homEquiv _ _).injective; rw [homEquiv_unit, homEquiv_unit]`.
- **load-bearing `show`** to restate the post-transpose goal in clean instance form (without it
  `rw [hLHS]` silently fails to key-match).
- `hLHS` turns `δ F₁` into the mate `μ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adj₁)` via
  `letI := rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adj₁; letI : adj₁.IsMonoidal := inferInstance; exact
  adj₁.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_δ A B`. (The `inferInstance` is the canonical scoped instance — it is
  NOT `hadj'.IsMonoidal`, so this is non-circular; lean-auditor confirmed.)
- `simp [unit_app_tensor_comp_map_δ_assoc]` (FULL simp) fires the two `@[reassoc(attr:=simp)]` `_assoc`
  mate lemmas (`unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_assoc`, `unit_app_tensor_comp_map_δ_assoc`).
- `conv_rhs => rw [← hnat, ← Category.assoc, tensorHom_comp_tensorHom]` slides μ past the H1.inv legs
  (`hnat` = combined `Functor.LaxMonoidal.μ_natural` — `_left`/`_right` variants don't fire on `⊗ₘ`).
- `exact congr_arg₂ (·≫·) (congr_arg₂ tensorHom (htri' A).symm (htri' B).symm) hμ` — the tailless
  final 2-factor contraction (rw/simp silently no-match `adjᵢ.unit ≫ G.map(…)` even on abstract fvars).

Result: `deltaConjOfMuComparison` axiom-clean (lean_verify: propext/Classical.choice/Quot.sound only);
`pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` body sorry-free, transitive sorry ONLY via `lhs_tmul`.

## Target: `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul` — PARTIAL (genuine split-step advance)
Committed the verified sectionwise split: `rw [Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal_μ,
Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]` then `rw [PresheafOfModules.comp_app, ModuleCat.hom_comp,
LinearMap.comp_apply]`. The opaque mate-μ value is now the explicit three-leg form
`(G.map (δ Gβ ≫ (ε⊗ₘε))).app W (unit.app Z .app W (m⊗ₜn))`. Honest typed sorry (auditor confirmed the
two tactic steps fired and the residual goal is a genuine complex sectionwise pure-tensor identity).
**Blocker:** the inner unit value lemma `pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply` does NOT fire
via `simp only` — the `hadj'` let-binding shadows the `pushforwardPushforwardAdj …` form the lemma
keys on (the η-side at L4236 worked because its term was not a tensor-`Z`).

## Key findings / patterns
- **Abstract-helper extraction** beats inline mate-calculus when the goal carries zeta-reduced
  statement-`let`s + heavy functor-composition sections: `Type*`/clean-fvar restatement dodges the
  whnf explosion and `rw` key-match failures entirely.
- In instance-heavy contexts `rw`/`simp`/`erw`/`slice`/`reassoc_of%` **silently no-match**
  `adjᵢ.unit.app x ≫ G.map(…)` even with a char-for-char-identical local `have`. Workarounds: FULL
  `simp` for `@[reassoc(attr:=simp)]` `_assoc` forms (need `≫?h` tail); `conv` for `← μ_natural`/assoc;
  `congr_arg₂` for the tailless final contraction.
- `unit_app_tensor_comp_map_δ` with `rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adj₁` is NON-circular; routing the
  μ-collapse through `hadj'.IsMonoidal` IS circular (consumes this lemma). Re-confirmed.

## Reviewer audits dispatched
- **lean-auditor (iter031):** 2 must-fix / 0 major / 7 minor. Both closures CONFIRMED honest + clean
  (no circular `hadj'.IsMonoidal`; `lhs_tmul` honest typed sorry with real committed split-step).
  Must-fix = two STALE header comments only: L46 ("sole sorry is `hmon`" — `hmon` now proved L4682–4739,
  sorry is at L4362) and L162 ("pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial sorry" — fully proved L4845–4870).
  Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter031.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker (substrate031):** 0 must-fix / 2 major / 1 minor. Signatures all faithful;
  lone sorry honest + correctly marked. Major1 = `deltaConjOfMuComparison` has no `\lean{}` blueprint
  block (coverage debt). Major2 = `lem:pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul` prose=value but
  Lean=per-section morphism (drift carried with an unactioned `% NOTE` since iter-029). Minor =
  collapse proof sketch now stale (refactored into helper), `\uses` omits it.
  Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-substrate031.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pushforward_mu_appiso_collapse` (proof block): added
  `% NOTE: (iter-031)` flagging the inline 4-step sketch is now factored into the new abstract Lean
  helper `deltaConjOfMuComparison` (no blueprint block yet) and the proof is a one-line `exact`.
- No `\leanok` override: `sync_leanok` iter=31 sha=89aa489 ran correctly (+34/−0) on the green tree.
- No `\lean{}` rename needed: all targets resolve in `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules`.

## Recommendations (see recommendations.md)
Top: blueprint-writer to (a) author the `deltaConjOfMuComparison` block, (b) reword the lhs_tmul prose
to the per-section form, (c) update collapse `\uses`. Then `lhs_tmul` prover lane (un-`let` `hadj'`
fix). TensorObjInverse `trivialisation_restrict_compat` still needs a thicker blueprint first. A cheap
comment-cleanup pass should fix the two stale headers (L46, L162).
